issues.description: First effect missing condition 'HasCardOnBoard' (hand ≤5 cards). Should check hand count before allowing draw.
Second effect uses Rest action, but card text specifies '−2 cost during this turn' which is a PowerBoost (negative modifier), not Rest. Should be PowerBoost with modifier:-2.
Missing duration:'DuringYourTurn' for the −2 cost effect ('during this turn' = turn-scoped, not permanent).
Target specifies 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but card says 'up to 1', implying optional selection. Confirm target structure supports 'up to' semantics.
